COMBINED SUPPLIER TAM
$3.88B per year    $23.28B cumulative

runs.text: DDG has two additive supplier streams.
Basic Construction supplier work is $365M per year and filtered AP/LLTM adds $208M per year, because DDG Basic Construction is net of prior-year AP.

text_body.plain_text:
DDG has two additive supplier streams.
Basic Construction supplier work is $365M per year and filtered AP/LLTM adds $208M per year, because DDG Basic Construction is net of prior-year AP.

runs.text: The 35.0% supplier share on $56.65B of Basic Construction yields $3.31B per year; supplier long-lead material already sits inside the boundary, so additive AP/LLTM remains $0.

text_body.plain_text:
Submarine AP/LLTM stays reference-only.
The 35.0% supplier share on $56.65B of Basic Construction yields $3.31B per year; supplier long-lead material already sits inside the boundary, so additive AP/LLTM remains $0.

runs.text: The combined TAM sums dollars, not rules.
DDG and submarine outputs sum to $3.88B per year and $23.28B cumulative; the AP/LLTM treatment remains program-specific and should not be blended.

text_body.plain_text:
The combined TAM sums dollars, not rules.
DDG and submarine outputs sum to $3.88B per year and $23.28B cumulative; the AP/LLTM treatment remains program-specific and should not be blended.

runs.text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN and P-5c Basic Construction and AP/LLTM budget justification, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DDG MYP-corrected outside-yards place-of-performance evidence; (3) submarine coefficient and AP/LLTM boundary analysis

text_body.plain_text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN and P-5c Basic Construction and AP/LLTM budget justification, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DDG MYP-corrected outside-yards place-of-performance evidence; (3) submarine coefficient and AP/LLTM boundary analysis
